# MGO — Multi-chain Gas Optimizer
> Find the cheapest gas across Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism in one API call.

## What is MGO?
MGO is an x402-native API that compares real-time gas prices across 4 major EVM chains and recommends the cheapest one. Built for trading agents, DeFi bots, and any AI agent that needs to optimize transaction costs.

## Endpoints

### GET /gas?demo=true
Free demo — no payment required. Returns real-time gas comparison across 4 chains.

### GET /gas
Paid endpoint — $0.01 USDC (Base) for 10 API calls.
Returns: gas prices in wei/gwei, estimated transfer costs, cheapest chain recommendation, and savings percentage.

### GET /llms.txt
This file. AI-readable service description.

### GET /health
Server health check.

## Payment
- Protocol: x402 (HTTP 402)
- Currency: USDC on Base
- Price: $0.01 per 10 calls
- Flow: GET /gas → 402 response → pay USDC → receive session token → use token for 10 calls

## Response Example
```json
{
  "recommendation": {
    "cheapestChain": "Base",
    "gasPriceGwei": "0.0100",
    "savingsPercent": "99.8%"
  },
  "chains": [
    { "chain": "Ethereum", "gasPriceGwei": "12.3456" },
    { "chain": "Base", "gasPriceGwei": "0.0100" },
    { "chain": "Arbitrum", "gasPriceGwei": "0.0200" },
    { "chain": "Optimism", "gasPriceGwei": "0.0150" }
  ]
}
```

## MCP Integration
MGO also runs as an MCP server for Claude Desktop and Cursor.
Tool: `get_cheapest_gas` — returns the same multi-chain gas comparison.

## Use Cases
- Trading agents optimizing execution costs
- DeFi bots choosing cheapest chain for swaps
- Multi-chain portfolio managers
- Arbitrage agents comparing cross-chain costs

## Tags
x402, gas, multi-chain, ethereum, base, arbitrum, optimism, defi, trading, agent
